coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 6:30 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 6:30 at 75%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/12. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 105% for 1:00. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/12. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 1:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 105% for 1:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 2/12.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/12. 10 to go. You've accumulated 1min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/12. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/12. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/12. 108% FTP × 1:00. Seated. 10 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/12. You're 25% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/12. 112% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/12. You're building something real here. 9 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/3. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 112% for 1:00. Execute each rep with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/12. You're 27% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/12. 1:00 at 115%. Cadence: 90-95 rpm. Seated. 8 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4/12. You're building something real here. 8 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1/3. 115%, 90-95 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 30% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 4:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 42% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 105% for 1:00. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 1min at 108%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 42% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 42% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 42% done. 105% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 45% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 108% FTP × 1:00. After rest, expect 112% for 1min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 45% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 45% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. 108% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 48% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 48% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 48% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 48% done. 112% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 51% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 1:00 at 115%. Then 4:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 51% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 51% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 51% done. 115% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 18 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 4:00. Then 11min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 4:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 12/12. Everything you have left. Leave nothing for the cooldown.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 66% complete. 105% for 1:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 85-90 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 8 minutes of hard work. You can do 3 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 66% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 22 minutes in. 105% FTP, 85-90 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 10/12. You're 69% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 69% through session. Rep 10/12. You've done 9min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 2 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 108% for 1:00. Then 0:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 reps left. 8 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 11/12. 1:00 at 112%. Cadence: 85-90 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 24 minutes of work done. 8 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 1 intervals left. 8 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 1:00 at 115%. Empty the tank. You've got 7 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 115-115% FTP, 85-90 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 7 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 1:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 115-115% FTP, 85-90 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 77% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 26 minutes of work done. 3 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 77% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 3 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 30 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 12min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 30 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 89% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
